overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Odyssey showing a character exploring the Village of Mykonos. The character walks along dirt paths between ancient Greek stone buildings with red painted walls, enters a house through wooden doorways, and continues through the village toward a waterfront warehouse district.

scene_state.functional_zone: village entrance path with scattered stone houses

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt path toward the village center, approaching a stone house with red painted walls

notable_agents.action: two women in ancient Greek dress standing and conversing beside the path

entered.detail: stone building with weathered red painted lower walls and wooden shutters
mature olive tree with thick trunk and green foliage
wooden cart loaded with stacked terracotta amphorae and sacks
red triangular fabric banner hanging from wooden pole
bush with bright pink flowers beside the path

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a sunlit dirt path entering the Village of Mykonos. Two NPC women stand conversing on the right near a large olive tree, while ahead lies a stone house with distinctive red painted walls. The environment features Mediterranean vegetation and scattered wooden carts.

scene_state.functional_zone: interior stone corridors of traditional house

events.description: character enters the stone house through a wooden doorway, transitioning from bright exterior to dim interior
moving through the dark corridor toward the brighter exit doorway at the far end

agents.ego_description: walking through the narrow stone corridors and passing wooden doorways inside the house

entered.detail: narrow passage with rough stone walls painted red and weathered plaster
small window with closed wooden shutters set in the thick stone wall
irregular stone paving tiles covering the corridor floor
heavy wooden door with metal ring handle at the corridor end

segments.scene_description: The character enters the stone house, leaving the bright Mediterranean sun for dimly lit interior corridors. The walls are painted in faded red with exposed stone patches. The camera moves through the narrow passage toward a wooden doorway leading back outside.

scene_state.functional_zone: village square with multiple stone houses and courtyard

events.description: exits the house into a sunlit courtyard with flowering trees and multiple stone buildings
turns left to follow the cobblestone path around the village center, passing two-story houses

agents.ego_description: walking through the village square, observing the stone houses with wooden balconies and interacting with the environment

notable_agents.action: villager in simple dress standing near a house entrance beside potted plants

entered.detail: open cobblestone square surrounded by stone houses with red painted walls
two-story stone house with wooden balcony and red painted lower walls
tree with vibrant purple blossoms in the village square
multi-level stone building with wooden shutters and balcony structures

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the house, the character enters a sunlit village courtyard surrounded by stone buildings with wooden balconies. A villager stands near a house entrance on the left. The path winds through the square past a vibrant purple flowering tree and ancient stone structures.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront warehouse district with view of the sea

events.description: approaching large warehouse building with red banners, revealing the sea through the archways

agents.ego_description: walking toward the large warehouse building near the waterfront, passing wooden supply carts

notable_agents.action: villager walking along the path toward the camera in the distance

entered.detail: long stone warehouse building with multiple archways and red triangular banners
crimson triangular flags hanging from the warehouse facade
multiple wooden carts loaded with supplies and crates parked beside the warehouse
view of the blue sea and horizon visible through the warehouse archways

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a large warehouse building near the waterfront, marked by red triangular banners. Wooden supply carts line the path, and the blue sea becomes visible through the stone archways of the warehouse. A lone villager walks along the path in the distance as the sun shines brightly over the coastal village.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a sunlit Greek village that transitions from open dirt paths through a dim interior and finally toward a coastal warehouse district. It begins on a bright Mediterranean path lined with olive trees and wooden carts, passing conversing women as the character approaches a red-walled stone house. As the character steps inside, the brilliant sunlight gives way to the muted tones of dimly lit corridors with faded red walls and exposed stone before moving through a wooden doorway back into the light. The scene then opens into a vibrant village courtyard featuring wooden balconies and a purple flowering tree, winding past ancient structures toward the waterfront. Finally, the path leads toward a large warehouse marked by red triangular banners, where the blue sea becomes visible through stone archways under a bright coastal sun.
